message:
fix(linux): enable screencast over SSH by using desktop display

- On Linux via SSH, skip headless mode and use DISPLAY=:0 to connect
  to the desktop's X server (Chrome headless doesn't support screencast)
- Disable SHM over SSH (remote SHM not accessible by local terminal)
- Add explicit PNG dimensions for Kitty graphics over SSH
- Default terminal detection to true for SSH compatibility
- Add TERMWEB_DEBUG conditional logging for WebSocket

This allows termweb to work over SSH when the Linux desktop is running,
by rendering Chrome to the desktop's display and streaming via CDP.
